tokens.@TYPE: Vitis Vision input/output pixel type selected by the composition layer.
tokens.@ROWS: Maximum image height used to specialize the hardware function.
tokens.@COLS: Maximum image width used to specialize the hardware function.
tokens.@NPC: Pixels processed per clock cycle selected by the composition layer.
tokens.@MUL_VALUE_WIDTH: Fixed-point width for black level multiplication value.
tokens.@FL_POS: Fractional bit position for black level multiplication value.
tokens.@USE_DSP: DSP usage flag for black level correction.
tokens.@XFCVDEPTH_IN: Internal Vitis Vision depth for input.
tokens.@XFCVDEPTH_OUT: Internal Vitis Vision depth for output.
tokens.@input_0: Input stream or matrix generated by the previous pipeline step.
tokens.@output_0: Output stream or matrix consumed by the next pipeline step.
tokens.@black_level: Black level offset provided by the concrete test configuration.
tokens.@MUL_VALUE: Q16.16 gain value computed from black_level and image bit depth.
